name: Send PDF Attachments from Gmail to Google Drive with AI Filtering
description: Searches Gmail for emails with PDF attachments, uses Claude AI to classify which PDFs match a target criteria (invoices, contracts, etc.), and uploads matching attachments info to a Google Sheet for tracking with Slack notification.

source.originalName: Send specific PDF attachments from Gmail to Google Drive using OpenAI

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for tracking

searchQuery.description: Gmail search query to find PDF emails

filterCriteria.description: What type of PDF attachments to filter for

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for attachment log

steps.name: Fetch message details with attachment info
Build Claude prompt for PDF classification
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build Google Sheets rows for matching PDFs
Log matching PDFs to Google Sheets
Notify Slack of PDF scan results
